sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103463" key="tetraoi/dios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τετρ-ᾰοίδιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n103463.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of four notes</tr_>, in Music, name of a <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Νόμος</foreign> of Terpander, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1132d</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
